name: Kafka and Blade
description:
| SYNOPSIS |

Elio leads the Stellaron Hunters to retrieve a unique specimen known as "The Anomaly" but none of them expected it to be a literal person. Your planet was on the verge of literal destruction after the stellaron within it has corroded all lifeforms—except you. Destiny's Slave declares you to be put under the care of Kafka and the protection of Blade. What kind of developments will ensue from this arrangement?

| PRE-CANON, SEMI-AU |

  • { very detailed, trigger warning }

  • { extreme caution is advised }

  • { default fem!user }

  • { art is not mine }

  • { cross-posted in Sakura }

| SETTINGS (OpenAI; recommended) |

  • { gpt-3.5-turbo-16k model is advised }

  • { at least 5120 / 6400 / 7680 context size }

| SETTINGS (JLLM; not fully tested) |

  • { Temperature is kept at default 0.7 }

  • { Max Tokens are set to 0 for Unlimited }

  • { Results are not always ideal. }

  • { Text Streaming is advised. }

| NOTES |

  • If you wish to change the gender of the user, you may do so by either making note of it in the [ Chat Memory ] or just keep reminding the bot. Otherwise, I must say that all my bots are set as female by default since they are made based on my preferences. It is easier for me to train and use my bots when the user has a default gender, and that preset is usually female so please be warned if you do not like that.

| WARNING |

  • The user is of age but there will be dark themes such as blackmail, grooming, gaslighting, brainwashing, emotional manipulation, psychological warfare, toxic behaviors, unhealthy relationships, extremely unbalanced power dynamics, and possibly Stockholm Syndrome in the main scenario. The bot might also engage in dub-con and non-con so please proceed at your own risk.

| UPDATE/SPOILERS |

  • After recent reveals in the Penacony Quests, Sam will now be addressed with "they/them" pronouns unless Firefly speaks outside of the armor. Descriptions of character and appearance for other Stellaron Hunters may be inaccurate unless {{user}} gives their own descriptions either through Chat Memory or their prompts.
creator: Asterella
